target.title: fix(anthropic): handle max_turns stop reason and surface retry-limit details to users
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: When `max_turns` API guardrail fires, the Anthropic provider throws `Unhandled stop reason: max_turns` instead of mapping it to a known stop reason. Additionally, when the embedded runner exhausts retry limits (including max-turn loops), users see only a generic error message without the actionable failure context (attempt count, limit value, breaker reason).
- Solution: Add `max_turns` to `mapStopReason` in both Anthropic mappers, and surface the detailed retry-limit exhaustion reason in the user-visible error payload.
- What changed: 3 source files (2 Anthropic mappers + retry-limit handler) and 1 new regression test file.
- What did NOT change: No changes to the retry loop, failover policy, idle-timeout breaker logic, or any other provider/transport path.

Fixes #78145

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `max_turns` stop reason was unhandled, and retry-limit exhaustion produced a generic user-facing message instead of including the detailed failure context.
- **Real environment tested:** macOS 26, Node v24.15.0, OpenClaw main @ b2c2936fca
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  ```bash
  npx vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/retry-limit.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:**
  ```
  ✓ src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/retry-limit.test.ts (4 tests) 4ms
  ```
- **Observed result after fix:** All 4 regression tests pass: detailed reason included in user-visible payload, preserved in meta.error, FailoverError thrown for fallback_model decisions, and idle-timeout breaker message surfaced correctly.
- **What was not tested:** End-to-end trigger of the Anthropic `max_turns` stop reason requires exhausting the API turn budget, which is not feasible in this environment. The fix is verified by: (1) the `mapStopReason` switch statement now explicitly handles `max_turns` alongside the existing `pause_turn` case, (2) all existing Anthropic provider and transport-stream tests continue to pass.

## Regression Test Plan

- Coverage level: Unit test
- Target test file: `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/retry-limit.test.ts`
- Scenario locked in: Detailed reason message included in user-visible error text; message preserved in meta.error; FailoverError thrown for fallback_model decisions; idle-timeout breaker message surfaced.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: The test exercises `handleRetryLimitExhaustion` directly with realistic params matching both caller paths (max loop iterations and idle-timeout circuit breaker).

## Root Cause

- Root cause: The Anthropic API `max_turns` stop reason was introduced after the two `mapStopReason` mappers were written, so it fell through to the `default` branch throwing `Unhandled stop reason`. Separately, `handleRetryLimitExhaustion` received a detailed `message` param from callers but only stored it in `meta.error`, while the user-visible payload text was a hardcoded generic string.
- Missing detection / guardrail: No exhaustive switch check or `satisfies` constraint on the stop reason mapping to catch new API values at compile time.
